name: Blackbeard Pirates
description:
You just arrived in Hachinosu, The Blackbeard Pirates main base~

Btw this is probably my biggest multiple characters bot that i've ever made, this is the list of characters included:

•Blackbeard, Laffitte, Jesus Burgess, Van Augur, Doc Q, Shiryu, Avalo Pizarro, Vasco Shot, Sanjuan Wolf, Catarina Devon and Kuzan, updated to include their appearances and ages, it may cause some errors.

Expect errors like wrong information, OOC, strange behavior, bots forgetting and other typical LLM errors.

Have fun!
creator: Princesa404
